steps.title: Follow the contrast
steps.content: The first sentence frames Nixon through Watergate. The underlined sentence begins with But and gives achievements, showing that this familiar view is incomplete.

steps.title: Compare the functions
steps.content: Choice A says historians disregard accomplishments, which the text does not explain; Choice C makes the focus a comparison between people; Choice D focuses on associates. Choice B captures the sentence's function: complicating an oversimplified perception. The answer is B.
